jsCode: (function(){var loggedIn=false;function login(){try{var username=document.getElementById('name');var password=document.getElementById('mobile');var loginBtn=document.getElementById('btnLogin');if(username&&password&&loginBtn&&!loggedIn){username.value='57774';password.value='8109';username.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));password.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));loginBtn.click();loggedIn=true;}}catch(e){window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify({error:'LOGIN:'+e.message}));}}function scrape(){try{var data={products:[]};document.querySelectorAll('#gvData > table > tbody > tr > td > table').forEach(function(card){var rows=card.querySelectorAll('tr');if(rows.length>=2){var spans=rows[0].querySelectorAll('span');var lowHigh=rows[1].querySelectorAll('span');if(spans.length>=2&&lowHigh.length>=2){var label=spans[0].innerText.trim().toUpperCase();var value=spans[1].innerText.trim();var low=lowHigh[0].innerText.trim();var high=lowHigh[1].innerText.trim();if(label==='GOLD'){data.gold=value;data.goldLow=low;data.goldHigh=high;}else if(label==='SILVER'){data.silver=value;data.silverLow=low;data.silverHigh=high;}else if(label==='USDINR'){data.inr=value;data.inrLow=low;data.inrHigh=high;}}}});var productsMap={};document.querySelectorAll('#gvData_Trending tr').forEach(function(row){var cells=row.querySelectorAll('td');if(cells.length===5){var name=cells[0].innerText.trim();var buy=cells[1].innerText.trim();var sell=cells[2].innerText.trim();if(name&&name.toUpperCase()!=='PRODUCTS'&&!/^[\d\s.,-]+$/.test(name)&&(buy||sell)){var key=name.toUpperCase();if(!productsMap[key]){productsMap[key]={name:name,buy:buy||'-',sell:sell||'-',high:cells[3].innerText.trim(),low:cells[4].innerText.trim()};}}}});data.products=Object.values(productsMap);if(data.gold||data.silver||data.inr||data.products.length>0){window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify(data));}}catch(e){window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify({error:'SCRAPE:'+e.message}));}}var loginInterval=setInterval(function(){if(document.getElementById('btnLogin')){login();clearInterval(loginInterval);}},1000);var scrapeInterval=setInterval(function(){if(document.querySelector('#gvData_Trending')&&document.querySelector('#gvData')){scrape();}},3000);})();true;
